# HowAutomate Tools
> Free AI-powered productivity tools for businesses and individuals.
> Built by HowAutomate — Data, AI & Automation agency (howautomate.com)

## Tools

- [PDF Converter](https://tools.howautomate.com/pdf-converter): Convert documents, images, spreadsheets and more to PDF instantly. Free, no signup required.
- [BMI Calculator](https://tools.howautomate.com/bmi-calculator): Calculate Body Mass Index with health category interpretation. Supports metric and imperial units.
- [DateTime Converter](https://tools.howautomate.com/datetime-converter): Convert dates and times across timezones and formats instantly.

## About HowAutomate
HowAutomate is a B2B AI & Automation agency helping businesses eliminate manual work using custom automation, AI assistants, and data workflows.
